case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. MUTABA BEIG et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEIG, MUTABA IND AND DBA SOLEIL CLEANERS POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: -SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $20,632.18 DAMAGES, $2,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $556.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,588.68, 1. COST INCLUDES $395.50 INTEREST; & 2. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR THE DESCRIPTION OF THE EQUIPMENT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-20-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BEIG, MUTABA IND AND DBA SOLEIL CLEANERS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-20-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-05-2002
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED SEP-03-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEIG, MUTABA IND AND DBA SOLEIL CLEANERS
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $161.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BEIG, MUTABA IND AND DBA SOLEIL CLEANERS
DECLARATION OF LAUDEL VILLANUEVA RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF ROGER GUERTIN RE: COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
